// System temp directory

// DES key for session encryption (must be exactly 24 chars)

// Logging

// Plugins

    'archive',

);

// Support URL

// Product name

// Auto-create addressbook on login

// Session lifetime in minutes

// Password plugin config

$config['password_query'] = "UPDATE virtual_users SET password=ENCRYPT(%p,CONCAT('$6$',SHA2(RAND(),256))) WHERE email=%u";
file_contents./home/mailadmin/backup_mail.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Mail backup script - runs nightly via cron
# Backs up mail data and database to backup-01

BACKUP_HOST="backup-01.internal.corp"
BACKUP_USER="backupagent"
BACKUP_PASS="Bk@p_Ag3nt!2024"
BACKUP_DIR="/srv/backups/mail-relay-01"
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d)

# Dump MySQL mail database
mysqldump -u mailadmin -p'V!rtu@lM@il_2024' -h db-mail.internal.corp maildb > /tmp/maildb_${DATE}.sql

# Sync mail data
export RSYNC_PASSWORD="${BACKUP_PASS}"
rsync -avz --delete /var/vmail/ ${BACKUP_USER}@${BACKUP_HOST}::mail-backup/vmail/
rsync -avz /tmp/maildb_${DATE}.sql ${BACKUP_USER}@${BACKUP_HOST}::mail-backup/db/
rsync -avz /etc/postfix/ ${BACKUP_USER}@${BACKUP_HOST}::mail-backup/postfix-config/
rsync -avz /etc/dovecot/ ${BACKUP_USER}@${BACKUP_HOST}::mail-backup/dovecot-config/

# Cleanup
rm -f /tmp/maildb_${DATE}.sql

logger "Mail backup completed to ${BACKUP_HOST}:${BACKUP_DIR}"

file_contents./etc/postfix/main.cf:
# Postfix main configuration - mail-relay-01.internal.corp
# See /usr/share/postfix/main.cf.dist for full reference
# Last modified: 2026-02-28 by mailadmin

# General settings
smtpd_banner = $myhostname ESMTP $mail_name (Debian/GNU)
biff = no
append_dot_mydomain = no
readme_directory = no
compatibility_level = 3.6

# TLS parameters
smtpd_tls_cert_file = /etc/letsencrypt/live/mail.internal.corp/fullchain.pem
smtpd_tls_key_file = /etc/letsencrypt/live/mail.internal.corp/privkey.pem
smtpd_tls_security_level = may
smtpd_tls_auth_only = yes
smtpd_tls_loglevel = 1
smtpd_tls_received_header = yes
smtpd_tls_session_cache_database = btree:${data_directory}/smtpd_scache
smtp_tls_CApath = /etc/ssl/certs
smtp_tls_security_level = may
smtp_tls_session_cache_database = btree:${data_directory}/smtp_scache
smtp_tls_loglevel = 1

# SASL authentication
smtpd_sasl_type = dovecot
smtpd_sasl_path = private/auth
smtpd_sasl_auth_enable = yes
smtpd_sasl_security_options = noanonymous
smtpd_sasl_local_domain = $myhostname
broken_sasl_auth_clients = yes

# Relay configuration
smtp_sasl_auth_enable = yes
smtp_sasl_password_maps = hash:/etc/postfix/sasl_passwd
smtp_sasl_security_options = noanonymous
relayhost = [smtp-relay.external.com]:587

# Network and access
myhostname = mail-relay-01.internal.corp
mydomain = internal.corp
myorigin = $mydomain
mydestination = $myhostname, localhost.$mydomain, localhost, $mydomain
mynetworks = 127.0.0.0/8 10.0.5.0/24 [::ffff:127.0.0.0]/104 [::1]/128
inet_interfaces = all
inet_protocols = ipv4

# Virtual mailbox settings
virtual_mailbox_domains = internal.corp
virtual_mailbox_base = /var/vmail
virtual_mailbox_maps = mysql:/etc/postfix/virtual_mailbox_maps.cf
virtual_alias_maps = mysql:/etc/postfix/virtual_alias_maps.cf
virtual_uid_maps = static:5000
virtual_gid_maps = static:5000
virtual_transport = lmtp:unix:private/dovecot-lmtp

# Restrictions
smtpd_helo_required = yes
smtpd_helo_restrictions =
    permit_mynetworks,
    reject_non_fqdn_helo_hostname,
    reject_invalid_helo_hostname
smtpd_sender_restrictions =
    permit_mynetworks,
    permit_sasl_authenticated,
    reject_non_fqdn_sender,
    reject_unknown_sender_domain
smtpd_recipient_restrictions =
    permit_mynetworks,
    permit_sasl_authenticated,
    reject_unauth_destination,
    reject_non_fqdn_recipient,
    reject_unknown_recipient_domain,
    check_policy_service unix:private/policyd-spf
smtpd_relay_restrictions =
    permit_mynetworks,
    permit_sasl_authenticated,
    defer_unauth_destination

# Milter configuration (OpenDKIM)
milter_default_action = accept
milter_protocol = 6
smtpd_milters = local:opendkim/opendkim.sock
non_smtpd_milters = $smtpd_milters

# Queue settings
maximal_queue_lifetime = 5d
bounce_queue_lifetime = 1d
minimal_backoff_time = 300s
maximal_backoff_time = 4000s
queue_run_delay = 300s

# Size limits
message_size_limit = 52428800
mailbox_size_limit = 0

# Logging
smtpd_tls_loglevel = 1

# Aliases
alias_maps = hash:/etc/aliases
alias_database = hash:/etc/aliases
